name: Vegetable Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish with cooking spray and flour.
3. Sauté onion and peppers in oil in a large skillet until tender.
4. Add broccoli, carrots, tomato sauce, basil, and salt to taste. Blend thoroughly.
5. Bring mixture to a boil, cover, reduce heat to simmer, and cook vegetables until just tender, about 15 minutes.
6. Stir in spinach.
7. Transfer the mixture to the prepared baking dish.
8. Mix parsley into mashed potatoes; spread over top of vegetables.
9. Bake for 15 minutes.
10. Sprinkle with paprika. Serve hot or warm.
